description_long: This is a modern, rectangular apartment building with two main sections joined at the center, each featuring a flat roof with a single chimney. The facade is punctuated by large, evenly spaced windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. Both sections have prominent balconies running along the upper floor, supported by slender columns, and partially wrapping around the sides. The ground level is slightly elevated, with open space beneath the balconies, suggesting possible parking or communal areas. The exterior is smooth and minimalist, with clean lines and a monochromatic color scheme. The overall design emphasizes functionality and contemporary urban living.
description: A modern, two-section apartment building with flat roofs, large windows, and wraparound balconies, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both main sections, prominent balconies, and large windows, with the central joining structure clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the balcony extension, and the arrangement of windows on the end facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, additional windows, and the symmetry between the two building sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other end of the building, with balcony details and window placements visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal and vertical rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across both building sections, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
